title: Animated Routes on Maps
author: MapTiler (Dominik Zochowski)
summary: Animated routes with dynamic cameras that follow a trail, flight, or road trip allow you to tell a story about where users are going and what they will see.

title: Tuning Geocoding Searches: A Guide to Better Results
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: Find out how to use the underlying logic of the geocoder and available parameters to fine-tune the search results for specific needs.

title: A New Map of Japan
author: MapTiler (Nicolas Bozon)
summary: We have a new, clean, modern map of Japan that uses its specific cartographic conventions. Built with a unique blend of official GSI data and MapTiler’s premium Planet-V4 mapping dataset.

title: Blend Your Custom Imagery into Global Satellite Maps
author: MapTiler (Jakub Bican)
summary: MapTiler Server 4.8 has been released, allowing you to blend your own aerial or drone imagery into global satellite maps using a visual editor; deploy rapidly to Apple computers with the macOS Installer. Plus is has updated geocoding with world views.

title: May Updates: Interactive 3D models and a New Map of Japan
author: MapTiler (Tom Armitage)
summary: A huge improvement to 3D models in our SDK enables great interactivity. We have a new, clean, modern map of Japan using their specific cartographic conventions.

title: OpenMapTiles 3.16: Transportation Layer Improvements and Style Enhancements
author: MapTiler (Tomas Pohanka)
summary: Version 3.16 offers improved road connections and dark-mode maps. Thanks to all the Open-source contributors who helped update it.

title: New Powerful Online Georeferencing
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: Instantly transform raw images into fully georeferenced map tiles ready to publish with the new online georeferencer. Position floor plans, architectural drawings, and drone imagery using an intuitive web interface.

title: April Updates: Professional Grids for Maps and a Huge Satellite Imagery Refresh
author: MapTiler (Tom Armitage)
summary: Create professional maps with gridlines, and a major update to our Satellite layer, adding up-to-date high-resolution imagery for Scandinavia and the US.

title: Ocean: The Map for Maritime Navigation
author: MapTiler (Petra Duriancikova)
summary: Uncover the depths of 71% of Earth with our Ocean map, which visualizes the seafloor's richness by revealing ridges, basins, and trenches in stunning detail.

title: March Updates: New Styles & Refined French Addressing
author: MapTiler (Tom Armitage)
summary: We’ve made a major update to our Map styles, including Satellite, Backdrop, and Aquarelle. We’ve also added over 650,000 new addresses, largely in rural areas of France, to our search and location services.

title: Topo Map: Precision in Every Terrain and Elevation
author: MapTiler (Petra Duriancikova)
summary: Empower critical operations with Topo: high-resolution terrain data, vector performance, and multilingual support via API or on-prem. Precision for every mission.

title: Better Postal Code Coverage and Accuracy Across the US and Canada
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: Our geocoding in North America just got a massive upgrade. Get 10x more postal codes in Canada and much more accurate US searches to power your logistics, checkouts, and other apps.

title: The Best Hiking, Biking, & Skiing Maps We've Ever Made
author: MapTiler (Nicolas Bozon)
summary: Outdoor and Winter map styles for hiking, biking, skiing, and all outdoor and winter sports now have more detail and clearer cartography. The best maps for making outdoor or activity tracking apps and websites.

title: Custom Map Controls to Match your Design
author: MapTiler (Dominik Zochowski)
summary: Fully control styling, behavior, and interaction logic of custom map controls. With MapTiler SDK JS, using native HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, you can fully control the map UI with declarative or programmatic APIs.

title: Multidirectional Hillshades and Terrain Color Ramps for Web Maps
author: MapTiler (Dalibor Janak)
summary: Style terrain by altitude with a new color relief functionality and advanced hillshade methods. Available in both Customize and the latest SDK.

title: Search US Addresses with Suites, Floors, Units, and More
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: Get precise results for searches on US addresses. Enhanced preprocessing of our Search now handles "messy" inputs such as floors, suites, and apartments.

title: GeoSplats Update: Superb Detail at Any Zoom Level With the New LoDs
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: GeoSplats, MapTiler’s photo-realistic 3D models have been upgraded with new Levels of Detail (LoDs). These give a significant performance boost and make advanced models usable on less powerful devices.

title: Better search for POIs and landforms
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: Our latest Geocoding update adds 3.8M+ new business POIs and improves search accuracy for natural landforms and cross-border features; all with zero integration changes.

title: Dataviz: the perfect map style for dashboards
author: MapTiler (Eva Jelinkova)
summary: The Dataviz map style is now easier to integrate into dashboards and interactive visualizations with its simple layer hierarchy and reliable base data.

title: Search upgrade: Locate buildings with a “/” in the name
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: Searches for locations with a slash in them are now more accurate with MapTiler's geocoding service. We account for local differences in how they are used around the world.

title: OpenStreetMap Dark: The community favorite, now optimized for the night
author: MapTiler (Petra Duriancikova)
summary: Experience the classic OpenStreetMap style in a dark mode. It offers cartography with high-contrast icons, colours, and typography to ensure perfect clarity against the dark background.

title: Style individual buildings with our new tileset
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: Upgrade your local cartography with the Buildings tileset: a high-detail expansion for the latest map v4 styles featuring stable IDs, 3D geometry, and precise entrance points.

title: Turn GeoPDFs into interactive maps
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: Transforming your static engineering drawings or scanned maps into interactive map layers is now easier than ever. Upload georeferenced PDFs directly to the Cloud.

title: GeoCamp/SotMes 2025: Spanish OSGeo & OpenStreetMap community conference
author: MapTiler (Wladimir Szczerban)
summary: Highlights of GeoCamp & SotM Spain 2025: from DuckDB and MapTiler innovations to a discussion with geospatial community and international experts.

title: Elevate your globe maps with custom space and halo
author: MapTiler (Dalibor Janak)
summary: Elevate your globe visualizations with new spacebox and halo features. Customize atmospheric effects and star backgrounds easily in Map Designer or the SDK.

title: Regional extracts for satellite imagery: Download only what you need
author: MapTiler (Jakub Bican)
summary: Save disk space: Regional extracts are now available for Satellite imagery. Select specific continents, countries, or cities to optimize your hosting.

title: Landscape: A map that inspires journeys & stories
author: MapTiler (Nicolas Bozon)
summary: The new Landscape map style: an artistic canvas for journeys. With unique hand-drawn hillshading and adaptive clarity, it brings your data stories to life.

title: The ultimate map canvas: introducing our Base style
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: The new Base map style: the ultimate map canvas for data visualization. Clean, unobtrusive, and AI-ready, it’s the perfect backdrop for your data.

title: 5 years of Innovation, Product news, & a Foundation Launch!
author: MapTiler (Tom Armitage)
summary: MapTiler's first user conference Connect 25 was a great success. Launching GeoSplats, Mobile Mapping SDKs, next-generation maps, Open Foundation, and more.

title: A new generation of street map
author: MapTiler (Petra Duriancikova)
summary: Introducing the new MapTiler Streets map. Features include localized shields, last-mile detail, Dark mode, and enhanced transit networks for navigation.

title: MapTiler for a good cause: Light Up Czechia
author: MapTiler (Barbora Soldatova)
summary: MapTiler supports Light Up Czechia by providing an interactive map that visualizes every donation.

title: Map rasterization on all platforms
author: MapTiler (Jakub Bican)
summary: On-premises rasterization is now available on all platforms with Server! Serve modern maps from any operating system to legacy systems that are up to 20 years old.

title: On-prem maps in three simple steps
author: MapTiler (Jakub Bican)
summary: MapTiler On-Prem has made it easy to get software to serve the maps you host on your own infrastructure.

title: New generation of MapTiler maps
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: Three new map styles with refreshed cartography with denser data across zoom levels are now avaiable for public testing.

title: New aerial imagery of Lithuania
author: MapTiler (Petra Duriancikova)
summary: Fresh 20 cm/px imagery from 2020–2024 is now available in the MapTiler satellite map.

title: Clean up your GPS tracks or any other spatial data
author: MapTiler (Martin Tesar)
summary: Use the vector data editor to simplify or smooth lines and polygons on your maps to make them look cleaner and load faster.

title: Updated aerial imagery of Spain
author: MapTiler (Petra Duriancikova)
summary: Spain has newly processed aerial imagery added to the MapTiler Satellite map.

title: High-resolution satellite imagery of Estonia
author: MapTiler (Petra Duriancikova)
summary: Fresh, high-quality aerial imagery of Estonia is now available in the MapTiler satellite map.

title: Join us at MapTiler Connect 25 in October
author: MapTiler (Tom Armitage)
summary: Save the date for MapTiler Connect 25, our first ever user conference! October 21st

title: Detailed aerial imagery of the Netherlands
author: MapTiler (Petra Duriancikova)
summary: A fresh set of 2024 aerial images has just been added to our satellite map, covering the Netherlands in remarkable clarity. The new data comes at 7.5 cm/px resolution, capturing the country’s unique mix of landscapes and cities with impressive precision.

title: Get the elevation of anywhere on Earth
author: MapTiler (Dalibor Janak)
summary: The Elevation API can be used to return the height above sea-level for any given location, or batch of locations

title: New high-resolution satellite map of Prague
author: MapTiler (Petra Duriancikova)
summary: The satellite map of Prague has just been updated with brand-new aerial imagery from 2024, now available in stunning 5 cm/px resolution.

title: Next-gen multithread processing in Engine 14.1
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: Convert your data into map tiles extremely fast and reliably with our next-gen multithread technology in MapTiler Engine 14.1.

title: Upload spatial data easily with our new JavaScript library
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: A TypeScript & JavaScript library for handling large file uploads with multipart support and progress tracking. The Upload JS provides a simple way to upload files to MapTiler and track progress.

title: FOSS4G Europe 2025: Learning, listening, & connecting
author: MapTiler (Tom Armitage)
summary: Find out what the MapTiler Team did at the FOSS4G Europe 2025 conference in Mostar.

title: 1 GB vector uploads now available
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: Drag and drop your vector geodata (up to 1 GB) into MapTiler to get it immediately ready for publishing online.

title: Constant improvement of global address search
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: Our global database of address points is continually expanding with new data from various sources—especially governmental and other public datasets.

title: Improved way to get on-prem maps data
author: MapTiler (Jakub Bican)
summary: The updated Data dashboard makes it simple to download geographical data for continents, countries, and cities.

title: Offline map search and geocoding
author: MapTiler (Jakub Bican)
summary: Search for places on maps and reverse geocode in your offline or self-hosted environments with MapTiler Server 4.7

title: High-resolution aerial imagery of Germany
author: MapTiler (Robert Slizik)
summary: Germany’s satellite map has been updated with crisp, high-resolution aerial imagery from recent years.

title: 3D models on JavaScript maps
author: MapTiler (Dominik Zochowski)
summary: The MapTiler SDK 3D Module lets you display 3D models in GLTF and GLB formats on maps.

title: My 5 key learnings from MapTiler’s visit to MWC25
author: MapTiler (Luis Suter)
summary: The MapTiler team attended the MWC25 conference in Barcelona and these are the key takeaways summarized by the team organizer, Luis Suter.

title: New aerial imagery for all 50 states of America
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: We have refreshed aerial satellite imagery for all 50 states of America. This considerable update means a full implementation of 2021-2023 data with cutting-edge resolution ranging from 15-60cm/px.

title: MapTiler expands into the United States
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: When Czech President Petr Pavel traveled to the United States, our Product Manager, Jaroslav Polacek, was part of the official delegation. He presented MapTiler to various audiences, strengthened business connections, and helped establish our presence.

title: 3D Globe maps using a JavaScript SDK
author: MapTiler (Petr Sloup)
summary: MapTiler SDK version 3 lets you display maps on a 3D globe using TypeScript

title: Task queuing in MapTiler Engine 14.0
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: Automate your workflows with MapTiler Engine 14.0! Discover Task Queues, detailed task reports, and advanced task settings for efficient data processing and cloud uploads.

summary: The best map customizations to make your maps fit your website or app design

title: Serve maps on ARM64 and in Kubernetes with MapTiler Server 4.6
author: MapTiler (Jakub Bican)
summary: Discover the new MapTiler Server 4.6 with ARM64 and Kubernetes support, and enhanced OGC Tiles API interoperability for versatile, enterprise-grade mapping solutions

title: Switzerland 2075: Visualising climate change
author: MapTiler (Tom Armitage)
summary: NZZ worked with MapTiler as a technology partner to create an advanced spatial data visualization about the effects of climate change.

title: Vector Data Editor revamped
author: MapTiler (Martin Tesar)
summary: The new version of our vector data editor makes creating and publishing your own vector geospatial data easier than ever.

title: Image icons and patterns for customized maps
author: MapTiler (Dalibor Janak)
summary: Upload PNGs to your maps to use as icons and patterns. You can add photos to use as icons for landmarks.

title: Import GIS data to webmaps
author: MapTiler (Dalibor Janak)
summary: Improved import of GIS data into webmaps now available in MapTiler Cloud

title: Intelligent workflows in MapTiler Engine 13.4
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: MapTiler Engine 13.4 has been released! This latest version streamlines processing workflows, making it much easier to convert your data to tiles, merge your tilesets, or upload your tilesets to the cloud.

title: Visualizing population density on JavaScript Maps
author: MapTiler
summary: Advanced data visualization of population density on maps using the MapTiler SDK weather module

title: Merging tilesets in MapTiler Engine 13.3
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: MapTiler Engine 13.3 has been released! This latest version brings great new features that help you to open and process your data faster, and merge two or more tilesets together.

title: OpenStreetMap data prepared for advanced cartography
author: MapTiler (Tomas Pohanka)
summary: OpenMapTiles 3.15, the open-source vector tiles map-generation tool, is out now. It enhances the road network, improves water features, and better cartography.

title: Customize icons to elevate your web maps
author: MapTiler (Petra Duriancikova)
summary: Customize your map icons using the latest version of MapTiler's Customize tool. Edit the icons color, size and other attributes or upload your own svgs or sprites to use on the map.

title: Effortless uploads to MapTiler Cloud from MapTiler Engine 13.2
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: The new MapTiler Engine 13.2 makes it easy to upload tilesets to MapTiler Cloud via the command line, share maps online & style them on free hosting, and get in touch with our team.

title: Create beautiful Tile Mosaics with MapTiler Server 4.5
author: MapTiler
summary: On-premise and Offline map server can now mosaic different layers with color-toning to create seamless, beautiful maps.

title: GeoCamp ES 2023
author: MapTiler (Wladimir Szczerban)
summary: GeoCamp ES is a non-profit, free-to-attend, and self-financed national conference of the international collective Geoinquietos. To talk and learn about earth sciences, open geodata services, free software, and GIS applications, especially around the OSGeo community.

title: Faster map tiling with the new MapTiler Engine 13
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: Greatly improved performance in MapTiler Engine 13, the latest release of the leading map tile rendering software.

title: Global high-resolution satellite map
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: A high-resolution satellite map of the entire world is now available to all free and paying users of MapTiler Cloud.

title: Personalized Static Maps with MapTiler Server
author: MapTiler
summary: Pesonalize static maps from your self-hosted server with markers, lines and areas.

title: Design amazing maps with our new style editor
author: MapTiler (Martin Pulicar)
summary: Edit maps quickly and easily with our powerful map design tool.

title: Free weather SDK & API for web maps & apps
author: MapTiler (Luis Suter)
summary: A free weather API for visualizing temperature, precipitation, wind, radar, pressure, and clouds to web maps and apps. Add weather layers and animations to your maps.

title: MapTiler has an open-source heart!
author: MapTiler (Jachym Cepicky)
summary: At MapTiler we believe in open source projects and actively contribute to several key ones in the geospatial industry. This means we are always keen to participate in the annual FOSS4G event, so we can share ideas ...

title: Protect your maps with fully customizable watermarks
author: MapTiler (Jaroslav Polacek)
summary: The latest version of MapTiler Engine lets you add beautiful custom watermarks to protect your maps without ruining them.

title: MapTiler are finalists at the Swiss Economic Forum
author: MapTiler (Luis Suter)
summary: The Swiss Economic Award is a prestigious prize that recognizes exceptional entrepreneurial accomplishments in Switzerland. More than 120 companies applied for this prize in 2023. The selection process involved ...

title: OpenMapTiles 3.14: New OpenStreetMap Style shows all the features
author: MapTiler (Tomas Pohanka)
summary: The new version of OpenMapTiles is available in an OpenStreetMap style, showing all the features available.

title: MapTiler SDK: JavaScript maps on steroids
author: MapTiler
summary: MapTiler has been creating a comprehensive mapping ecosystem for businesses, including advanced processing tools like Desktop/Engine, data storage and processing services, QGIS plugins, geocoding and geolocation services, JavaScript libraries, map styling tools, and more. Until now, we primarily relied on the open-source community and MapLibre for displaying maps on the web. While this will continue, we are taking it to…

title: Upload Tiles to MapTiler Server 4.3 via API
author: MapTiler
summary: What’s new in 4.3: Smoother automated workflows, you can upload new tiles via API Easier to use API: functionality aligned with the Cloud API documentation updates License changes, get your new key now! Improved raster handling, faster and more efficient Download the latest version of MapTiler Server for free now!

title: Map the ocean with MapTiler
author: MapTiler (Nicolas Bozon)
summary: MapTiler Ocean, the latest addition to MapTiler Cloud, describes the world’s oceans in great detail and brings new possibilities for marine cartography. Containing detailed bathymetry as hillshading and contours, it lets you add detail and interest to what is usually blue space on the map.

title: Upgraded Attribution free maps
author: MapTiler (Tomas Pohanka)
summary: Planet Lite, our copyright-free map of the entire world, has been upgraded with enhanced features and issue fixes have been made to our lite version of MapTiler Planet. This latest release of the Lite version of MapTiler Planet has improved compatibility, boundaries, and some new features and upgrades.

title: Satellite Imagery on Demand!
author: MapTiler (Luis Suter)
summary: Get high resolution satellite imagery for your specified date and location. MapTiler and Satellogic have partnered to bring you tasked imagery at the most competitive prices, ready for use in your web maps and apps.

title: Control MapTiler Server 4.2 via API
author: MapTiler
summary: MapTiler Server 4.2 has many improvements, giving you API controls, Static maps, WMS services and High DPI maps.

title: MapTiler Desktop becomes MapTiler Engine
author: MapTiler (Martin Mikita)
summary: MapTiler Desktop is now MapTiler Engine! Faster processing, optimized tiles, affordable pricing and many more improvements.

title: Aerial Maps updated across Europe and New Zealand
author: MapTiler (Tom Armitage)
summary: Updated aerial images have been added to the Cloud and Data services this year, covering Italy, Spain, Portugal, Belgium, Slovakia, Estonia, and New Zealand.

title: MapTiler at the biggest map conference SotM 2022
author: MapTiler (Jiri Komarek)
summary: MapTiler visited one of the biggest mapping conferences in the world, State of the Map 2022. Our talk focused on a new open map style that is becoming part of the open-source OpenMapTiles project.

title: Detailed hillshading anywhere in the world!
author: MapTiler (Adam Laza)
summary: New version of MapTiler QGIS Plugin 3.0 with detailed global terrain, contour lines, hillshading, and maps using these terrain data for outdoor activities.

title: Create amazing 3D weather radar maps
author: MapTiler (Luis Suter)
summary: Build animated weather radar maps with MapTiler Weather

title: Cadastral maps with vector tiles
author: MapTiler (Nicolas Bozon)
summary: Cadastre maps for your website or app using Vector tiles from MapTiler.

title: MapLibre V2: Add 3D terrain to your map
author: MapTiler (Wladimir Szczerban)
summary: The second generation of MapLibre GL JS is here! It has been rewritten in TypeScript and maps can be displayed in 3D. All previous apps, styles, and custom maps continue to work and are now 3D-ready.

title: OpenStreetMap Vector Basemaps
author: MapTiler (Nicolas Bozon)
summary: OpenStreetMap’s familiar styling is now available for developers to adapt and use with vector basemaps.

title: Custom map portal: a start to end guide
author: MapTiler (Wladimir Szczerban)
summary: Create your own geoportal with a custom map, your own data, a map legend, a place-name search, a satellite view of a selected building, and a street view.

title: Customized maps made easy
author: MapTiler (Dalibor Janak)
summary: Choosing from various pre-defined map styles and customizing maps is much easier with the new Cloud UX and the refreshed map designer tool.

title: Upload your map from a command line using API
author: MapTiler (Wladimir Szczerban)
summary: MapTiler Cloud Admin API allows you to upload map data, change the metadata of already created tiles, add new ones, update, or delete them.

title: Maps for winter sports apps
author: MapTiler (Nicolas Bozon)
summary: MapTiler has made a winter-themed basemap enabling you to build ski resort maps or apps to track ski routes, plan winter sports, and apres-ski entertainment.

title: Japanese maps just got way better!
author: MapTiler (Martin Elias)
summary: MapTiler have greatly improved the styling of their maps of Japan, and these styles are available to use anywhere on Earth.

title: Maps for game engines
author: MapTiler
summary: Create the most stunning game environments by modifying real terrain maps of any place on Earth.

author: MapTiler (Adam Laza)
summary: Details of MapTiler QGIS Plugin 3.0 with a global terrain basemap and customizable OpenStreetMap vector tiles.

title: OpenMapTiles 3.13: Better route maps
author: MapTiler (Tomas Pohanka)
summary: What's new in the latest version of the very successful open-source project OpenMapTiles used by 250 millions users every month.

title: Making global satellite imagery cloud-free

summary: How MapTiler created beautiful cloudless satellite maps of the whole world with ESA Sentinel-2 data.

summary: Satellite and high-resolution aerial imagery of the USA, Europe, and Japan is now available for self-hosting from on-prem environments or offline laptops.

title: Free access to 10m global satellite map
author: MapTiler

author: MapTiler

title: MapTiler Desktop 11.3 brings custom basemaps

title: Detailed maps with quality control
author: MapTiler (Dalibor Janak)

title: MapTiler awarded as the most innovative Swiss startup

author: MapTiler (Tomas Pohanka)

title: MapTiler Desktop 11.2 with estimated rendering time
author: MapTiler (Martin Mikita)
summary: The brand new MapTiler Desktop 11.2 arrived with estimation of rendering time.

author: MapTiler (Nicolas Bozon)
summary: Map for hiking, biking, and other outdoor adventures.

title: MapLibre GL Native: open-source mobile SDK for Android and iOS
author: MapTiler (Petr Pridal)
summary: Introducing a new open-source map library for both Android and iOS.

title: Visualize Weather Forecast with WebGL
author: MapTiler (Petr Sloup)
summary: New JavaScript components for animating weather data like temperature, wind flow, or any other scientific information were developed by our team.

title: Launching MapTiler Switzerland
author: MapTiler (Luis Suter)
summary: MapTiler is launching MapTiler.ch, a home for customers from Switzerland.

title: French imagery ready for your next project with MapTiler
author: MapTiler (Nicolas Bozon)
summary: More than half a million square kilometers of 20cm/px resolution aerial imagery processed and ready to be used via API or for download.

title: MapTiler Desktop 11 with enhanced UX
author: MapTiler (Martin Mikita)
summary: The 11th version of our data-into-maps converting software MapTiler Desktop makes the already easy to use interface even easier and the wizard will guide you like in a tutorial. Moreover, with the new user flow, you can start using MapTiler Desktop as a viewer for your geodata.

title: Swisstopo maps via API or offline
author: MapTiler (Luis Suter)
summary: The recently launched swisstopo maps are now available for commercial use from MapTiler’s global infrastructure with guaranteed SLA, seamlessly blended with global maps, as raster tiles, on mobile devices, with dark and gray styles, and much more!

title: Launch of the swisstopo vector maps
author: MapTiler (Luis Suter)
summary: MapTiler Team has been working with swisstopo, the Swiss Federal Office of Topography, to develop a new vector map for the modern user.

title: How we provide maps for Geocaching
author: MapTiler (Jiri Komarek)
summary: Geocaching is a world-wide game where people search for hidden treasures. MapTiler provides the official website data for the background map that shows where all these boxes are hidden.

title: OpenMapTiles 3.12: improved city centers
author: MapTiler (Tomas Pohanka)
summary: The new version of the very sucessful open-source project OpenMapTiles used by 250 millions users every month was just released.

title: MapLibre: Mapbox GL open-source fork
author: MapTiler (Petr Pridal)
summary: After Mapbox announced the closure of Mapbox GL JS, the community made a collective decision to maintain and further develop the last open-source version and build a free alternative.

title: Launching MapTiler Data for self-hosting
author: MapTiler (Dalibor Janak)

author: MapTiler
summary: Run street, satellite, and terrain maps of the entire world from your server, private cloud, virtual machine, or laptop.

summary: The GEOlayers plugin for Adobe After Effects is a powerful tool for adding maps into videos.

author: MapTiler (Nicolas Bozon)

title: Swisstopo vector tiles development
author: MapTiler (Petr Pridal)
summary: We are happy to announce our collaboration with the Swiss Federal Office of Topography swisstopo.

title: MapTiler Desktop Next Generation

summary: What should be in the upcoming version of MapTiler Desktop? Tell us!

title: MySwitzerland.com Maps now powered by MapTiler Cloud!
author: MapTiler (Luis Suter)
summary: MapTiler is excited to announce a partnership with MySwitzerland.com.

title: Vector tiles in QGIS 3.14
author: MapTiler (Adam Laza)

title: Introducing MapTiler Server
